sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_dict DICTIONARY, iri_column IRI);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, data_dict, iri_column) VALUES (1, dict_duplicate(DICT('key1', 'value1', 'key2', 'value2')), 'http://example.com/resource1');
SELECT id, data_dict, iri_column FROM test_table WHERE isIRI(iri_column) AND data_dict['key1'] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, dict_duplicate(data_dict) AS duplicated_dict FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE isIRI(iri_column) AND data_dict['key2'] IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE sub_test (sub_id INT, related_id INT, sub_data DICTIONARY, CONSTRAINT fk_related FOREIGN KEY (related_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO sub_test (sub_id, related_id, sub_data) VALUES (1, 1, dict_duplicate(DICT('keyA', 'valueA')));
SELECT t.id, t.data_dict, s.sub_data FROM test_table t JOIN sub_test s ON t.id = s.related_id WHERE isIRI(t.iri_column) AND dict_duplicate(s.sub_data)['keyA'] = 'valueA';
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY data_dict['key1']) AS key1_count FROM test_table GROUP BY id, data_dict ORDER BY key1_count DESC HAVING key1_count > 1;
SELECT t.id, dict_duplicate(t.data_dict) AS full_copy FROM test_table t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sub_test s WHERE s.related_id = t.id AND isIRI(s.sub_data['keyA']) AND s.sub_data IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, dict_duplicate(data_dict) AS dict_copy FROM test_table WHERE data_dict IS NULL OR LENGTH(data_dict) = 0;
SELECT t.id, t.data_dict FROM temp_table t WHERE t.dict_copy IS NOT NULL AND isIRI(t.id::VARCHAR);
